title: French Delicate Omelette
description: A simple yet elegant omelette dish with a delicate French twist.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together. Season with a pinch of salt.
Heat a small non-stick pan over medium heat. Add the butter and let it melt.
Once the butter has melted, pour in the eggs. Let them cook for about 10 seconds.
Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the omelette towards the center.
Continue cooking and folding the omelette until the eggs are almost set.
Use the spatula to carefully flip the omelette over and cook for another 10-15 seconds.
Slide the omelette onto a plate and garnish with chopped parsley.
